drills.name: Wall Rebounder Passing
drills.instructions: Stand 5 m from a wall. Pass the ball at a marked target (tape a 50 cm × 50 cm square). Receive the rebound and repeat. 3 × 20 passes each foot.
drills.coach_tip: Plant your foot beside the ball, not behind it. Strike through the centre.
drills.progression: Reduce target size to 30 cm × 30 cm as accuracy improves.

drills.name: Triangle Passing Circuit
drills.instructions: Set up 3 cones in a triangle (8 m apart). Pass and move to the next cone. Maintain one-touch passing rhythm. 5 minutes each direction.
drills.coach_tip: Open your body before the ball arrives. Decide where to pass before you receive.
drills.progression: Add a defender in the middle.

drills.name: Weak Foot Isolation Drill
drills.instructions: Using only your weaker foot, pass against a wall from 5 m. 100 passes total. Focus on clean contact, not power.
drills.coach_tip: Your weaker foot only becomes stronger through deliberate repetition. 100 reps minimum per session.
drills.progression: Increase distance to 8 m. Add moving targets.
